style.name: Celestial Cartography
style.zhName: Celestial Cartography 天体航海图风格
style.description: A unified editorial poster system using deep ocean ink, parchment gold, constellation lines, instrument-grid maps and restrained coral accents, with fixed Xiazi and Doudoulong IP figures adapted through props, posture and scene roles.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 霍尔木兹谈判、巴威登陆与AI资本同日升温
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界在给航道、天气、芯片和公共卫生重新标价
zh-CN.headlineFull: 霍尔木兹谈判、巴威登陆与AI资本同日升温；世界在给航道、天气、芯片和公共卫生重新标价。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯窗口没有新增完赛结果，但四强席位争夺进入临界点；美伊围绕霍尔木兹继续互放狠话，台风巴威登陆中国东部，西班牙山火和刚果埃博拉敲响气候与公共卫生警报。资本市场则继续押注AI芯片，关键资源从油气延伸到氦气和高带宽内存。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的共同主题是基础设施：航道、城市、医院、芯片和赛事日程，任何一环失灵，世界都会立刻感到价格。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 天气、油价、芯片和足球都在催更，钱包先替大家点了订阅。

en-US.headlineFact: Hormuz talks, Typhoon Bavi and AI capital all heat up in one day
en-US.headlineView: the world is repricing routes, weather, chips and public health
en-US.headlineFull: Hormuz talks, Typhoon Bavi and AI capital all heat up in one day; the world is repricing routes, weather, chips and public health.
en-US.intro: In the latest 24-hour window, the World Cup had no newly completed match by Beijing 05:00, while the next quarterfinals reached kickoff. U.S.-Iran threats kept Hormuz diplomacy fragile, Typhoon Bavi made landfall in eastern China, Spain's wildfire and Congo's Ebola outbreak sharpened climate and health risks, and AI capital kept flowing into chip supply chains.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Today is about infrastructure: routes, cities, hospitals, chips and match calendars. When one layer fails, the price is immediate.
en-US.doudouQuote: Weather, oil, chips and football are all asking for updates; the wallet already subscribed.

sources.title: ChatGPT prompt submitted; live source checks replaced stale output

zh-CN.headlineFact: 05点截稿前世界杯没有新增完赛结果
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛最紧张的时刻，是结果还没写出来
zh-CN.headlineFull: 05点截稿前世界杯没有新增完赛结果；淘汰赛最紧张的时刻，是结果还没写出来。
zh-CN.intro: 本期统计窗口为北京时间7月11日05:00至7月12日05:00。FIFA赛程显示，7月11日两场四分之一决赛为挪威对英格兰、阿根廷对瑞士；其中挪威对英格兰在北京时间05:00开球，截稿时尚未形成完赛赛果。因此今天世界杯日报记录为无新增完赛结果，并提示四强最后两个席位即将决出。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 日报不应该为了热闹把未完赛写成结果；真正专业的更新，有时就是承认钟点线还没越过终场哨。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 球刚开踢就要比分，这不是日报，是许愿池。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：世界杯日报。

en-US.headlineFact: No World Cup match was completed before the 05:00 Beijing cutoff
en-US.headlineView: the tensest knockout moment is before the result exists
en-US.headlineFull: No World Cup match was completed before the 05:00 Beijing cutoff; the tensest knockout moment is before the result exists.
en-US.intro: The reporting window runs from Beijing time July 11 05:00 to July 12 05:00. FIFA's schedule lists Norway vs England and Argentina vs Switzerland for July 11, with Norway vs England kicking off exactly at the Beijing cutoff. No full-time result existed inside the window, so today's World Cup Daily records no new completed match and flags the final semifinal spots as imminent.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A daily report should not turn an unfinished match into a result. Sometimes the professional update is simply respecting the whistle.
en-US.doudouQuote: Asking for a score at kickoff is not reporting; it is wishing.

sources.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 match schedule and fixtures
World Cup schedule today: Norway v England and Argentina v Switzerland

zh-CN.headlineFact: 特朗普与伊朗最高领袖互放威胁
zh-CN.headlineView: 霍尔木兹的安全感仍卡在一句公开保证上
zh-CN.headlineFull: 特朗普与伊朗最高领袖互放威胁；霍尔木兹的安全感仍卡在一句公开保证上。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，美伊围绕霍尔木兹海峡通行继续紧张。美国要求伊朗公开保证航道安全开放，伊朗强硬派则坚持对海峡拥有控制权并提出收费主张。特朗普与伊朗新任最高领袖互相威胁，同时阿曼等调解方仍试图保住谈判渠道。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当一条海峡承载全球油气价格，外交就不只是发声明，而是要让商船敢重新排队通过。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 航道最怕嘴炮开得比船还快。

en-US.headlineFact: Trump and Iran's supreme leader trade threats
en-US.headlineView: Hormuz confidence still depends on one public guarantee
en-US.headlineFull: Trump and Iran's supreme leader trade threats; Hormuz confidence still depends on one public guarantee.
en-US.intro: AP reported renewed U.S.-Iran tension around the Strait of Hormuz. Washington wants Tehran to publicly guarantee safe shipping, while Iranian hard-liners insist on control and fees. Trump and Iran's new supreme leader traded threats even as Oman and other mediators tried to preserve talks.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When one strait carries global energy prices, diplomacy is not a statement; it is making ships willing to queue again.
en-US.doudouQuote: The fastest traffic in the strait today may be the rhetoric.

sources.title: Trump and Iran's supreme leader trade threats as the fate of Strait of Hormuz challenges talks

zh-CN.headlineFact: 台风巴威登陆浙江，东亚大范围应急
zh-CN.headlineView: 极端天气考的是城市执行力
zh-CN.headlineFull: 台风巴威登陆浙江，东亚大范围应急；极端天气考的是城市执行力。
zh-CN.intro: AP称，台风巴威在中国浙江登陆，强风暴雨影响中国东部、台湾、日本南部岛屿和菲律宾季风区。中国东部超过170万人转移，上海、福建、浙江等地启动停课、停航、救援和雨暴预警；台湾疏散逾万人，日本冲绳也取消大量航班。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 预报只是第一步，真正决定损失的是学校、港口、社区和家庭能不能同步行动。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 别跟台风讲道理，先把窗、船、行程都收回来。

en-US.headlineFact: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in Zhejiang
en-US.headlineView: extreme weather tests execution, not slogans
en-US.headlineFull: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in Zhejiang; extreme weather tests execution, not slogans.
en-US.intro: AP said Typhoon Bavi made landfall in Zhejiang, affecting eastern China, Taiwan, Japan's southern islands and monsoon-hit parts of the Philippines. More than 1.7 million people were evacuated in eastern China, while schools, ferries, flights and emergency teams shifted into storm mode across the region.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Forecasting is step one. Losses are decided by whether schools, ports, communities and families act together.
en-US.doudouQuote: Do not debate the typhoon; bring back the windows, boats and schedules first.

sources.title: Typhoon Bavi makes landfall in eastern China as more than 1 million are evacuated

zh-CN.headlineFact: 西班牙山火已致至少12人死亡
zh-CN.headlineView: 热浪正在把度假地变成系统压力测试
zh-CN.headlineFull: 西班牙山火已致至少12人死亡；热浪正在把度假地变成系统压力测试。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，西班牙安达卢西亚阿尔梅里亚省贝达尔附近山火已造成至少12人死亡，约66平方公里森林和农地被烧毁，1400多人疏散。大火发生在西班牙六周内第三轮热浪期间，欧洲多地仍处高火险状态，法国也出现大面积火情。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 气候风险最可怕之处，是它会把旅游、养老、消防、交通和医疗一次性拖进同一张考卷。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以为是海边假期，结果系统弹出火险考试。

en-US.headlineFact: A Spanish wildfire has killed at least 12
en-US.headlineView: heat is turning holiday zones into stress tests
en-US.headlineFull: A Spanish wildfire has killed at least 12; heat is turning holiday zones into stress tests.
en-US.intro: AP reported that a wildfire near Bedar in Spain's Almeria province killed at least 12 people, burned about 66 square kilometers of forest and farmland, and forced more than 1,400 evacuations. It came during Spain's third heat wave in six weeks, while France and other European regions faced high fire risk.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The danger of climate risk is that tourism, retirement, firefighting, transport and hospitals sit for the same exam.
en-US.doudouQuote: You booked a seaside holiday; the system opened a wildfire test.

sources.title: Hundreds of firefighters battle wildfire in southern Spain that killed at least 12

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国公民在刚果埃博拉疫情中确诊
zh-CN.headlineView: 病毒不会等援助预算重新开会
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国公民在刚果埃博拉疫情中确诊；病毒不会等援助预算重新开会。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，一名在刚果人道组织工作的美国公民埃博拉检测呈阳性。非洲疾控称，本轮疫情已达1830例确诊、648人死亡，由暂无获批疫苗或疗法的Bundibugyo毒株引发。资金短缺、医疗设施遇袭和东部冲突正在削弱防控。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 公共卫生的短板往往不是医学知识，而是钱、人、信任和安全能不能同时到位。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 病毒不看预算表，防线却常常卡在预算表。

en-US.headlineFact: A U.S. citizen tests positive in Congo's Ebola outbreak
en-US.headlineView: viruses do not wait for aid budgets to reconvene
en-US.headlineFull: A U.S. citizen tests positive in Congo's Ebola outbreak; viruses do not wait for aid budgets to reconvene.
en-US.intro: AP reported that a U.S. citizen working for a humanitarian group in Congo tested positive for Ebola. Africa CDC figures cited 1,830 confirmed cases and 648 deaths, driven by the Bundibugyo strain with no approved vaccine or treatment, while funding gaps, attacks on medical sites and conflict undermine control.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The weak link in public health is often not knowledge, but whether money, staff, trust and security arrive together.
en-US.doudouQuote: The virus does not read budgets, but the defense line often gets stuck there.

sources.title: US citizen tests positive for Ebola in Congo

zh-CN.headlineFact: SK海力士美股首秀大涨近13%
zh-CN.headlineView: AI热潮正在把内存芯片推到资本舞台中央
zh-CN.headlineFull: SK海力士美股首秀大涨近13%；AI热潮正在把内存芯片推到资本舞台中央。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，韩国存储芯片巨头SK海力士在华尔街首秀上涨12.8%，ADR发行价149美元、收于168.01美元，融资约265亿美元，成为外资公司在美国最大规模IPO之一。高带宽内存需求、英伟达合作和美国建厂计划让AI基础设施继续吸引资本。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI不是只消耗模型想象力，它还消耗内存、土地、电力、资本和供应链耐心。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前追风口，现在风口要先排队买内存条。

en-US.headlineFact: SK Hynix jumps nearly 13% in its Wall Street debut
en-US.headlineView: the AI boom is pushing memory chips onto center stage
en-US.headlineFull: SK Hynix jumps nearly 13% in its Wall Street debut; the AI boom is pushing memory chips onto center stage.
en-US.intro: AP reported that South Korean memory-chip maker SK Hynix rose 12.8% in its Wall Street debut, pricing ADRs at $149 and closing at $168.01 after raising about $26.5 billion. Demand for high-bandwidth memory, Nvidia ties and a planned U.S. site keep AI infrastructure at the center of capital markets.
en-US.xiaziQuote: AI consumes more than model imagination; it consumes memory, land, power, capital and supply-chain patience.
en-US.doudouQuote: The new gold rush starts with waiting in line for memory chips.

sources.title: SK Hynix rises nearly 13% in debut on Wall Street as demand for memory chips soars amid AI frenzy

zh-CN.headlineFact: 中国临时禁止氦气出口
zh-CN.headlineView: 芯片竞争连冷却气体都变成战略变量
zh-CN.headlineFull: 中国临时禁止氦气出口；芯片竞争连冷却气体都变成战略变量。
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，中国宣布临时禁止氦气出口，理由是保护国内产业供应。伊朗战争扰乱全球供应并推高价格，氦气又是半导体制造和核磁共振等医疗设备的重要资源。中国本身也依赖卡塔尔等来源进口氦气，因此此举更像供应安全防守。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 高科技竞争最后会落到很朴素的问题：谁有气体、谁有电、谁能稳定交付。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 芯片很先进，冷却它的气体也突然不普通了。

en-US.headlineView: chip competition now reaches even cooling gases
en-US.headlineFull: China temporarily bans helium exports; chip competition now reaches even cooling gases.
en-US.intro: AP reported that China temporarily banned helium exports to protect domestic supply. The Iran war has disrupted global availability and raised prices, while helium remains essential for semiconductor manufacturing and MRI systems. Because China also relies on imports, the move looks more like supply-defense than simple leverage.
en-US.xiaziQuote: High-tech competition often ends with plain questions: who has gas, power and reliable delivery?
en-US.doudouQuote: The chip is advanced, and now the gas that cools it has become strategic.

sources.title: China blocks exports of helium, key for chipmaking, as Iran war squeezes supply

zh-CN.headlineFact: AP调查揭示美国AI技术被诈骗产业滥用
zh-CN.headlineView: 工具越强，责任链越不能装作看不见
zh-CN.headlineFull: AP调查揭示美国AI技术被诈骗产业滥用；工具越强，责任链越不能装作看不见。
zh-CN.intro: AP与FRONTLINE调查显示，美国AI和其他技术被东南亚诈骗园区用于工业化诈骗。报道指出，相关工具帮助诈骗者生成话术、翻译、伪装身份和扩大触达，让跨国诈骗从人工密集型变成软件驱动型产业。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 技术中立不等于责任中立，平台、支付、云服务和监管都不能只看增长曲线。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: AI帮人提高效率，也可能帮坏人提高KPI。

en-US.headlineFact: AP investigation shows U.S. AI tech abused by scam compounds
en-US.headlineView: the stronger the tool, the harder it is to ignore responsibility
en-US.headlineFull: AP investigation shows U.S. AI tech abused by scam compounds; the stronger the tool, the harder it is to ignore responsibility.
en-US.intro: An AP and FRONTLINE investigation found that American AI and other technologies are being used by Southeast Asian scam compounds to industrialize fraud. The tools help generate scripts, translate, impersonate and scale outreach, turning cross-border scams into software-driven operations.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Technological neutrality does not mean responsibility neutrality. Platforms, payments, cloud services and regulators cannot watch only growth curves.
en-US.doudouQuote: AI improves productivity, including for people with very bad KPIs.

sources.title: Takeaways from AP/'FRONTLINE' investigation into how US tech is abused for global scams
